phases.evidence: User requested a repaired Common Core archive; two v2.22 archives, self-test data, dialogue export and theory documents were captured.
phases.name: INPUT_CAPTURED

phases.evidence: Task bounded to BOIS history, theory, practice, canonical PDFs and passive machine-readable projections.
phases.name: PHENOMENON_BOUNDED

phases.evidence: D=Common Core maintenance release; V=self-consistency, truthfulness, human authority; S=AI + human + file memory.
phases.name: GOAL_AND_DVS_CONFIRMED

phases.evidence: Separated normative v2.22 canon, derived projections, dialogue evidence, self-test findings and empirical unknowns.
phases.name: EPISTEMIC_INVENTORY

phases.evidence: Task classified as artifact repair and release, not field validation or public publication.
phases.name: QUESTION_OR_TASK_QUALIFIED

phases.evidence: Maintenance version 2.23; normative PDFs unchanged; repair schemas, references, checks, runtime and provenance; no executable code.
phases.name: ROUTE_FROZEN

phases.evidence: Repairs and projections generated; validation logic executed outside the archive.
phases.name: COGNITIVE_TRANSFORMATION

phases.evidence: Every check and registry test receives evidence and static status; QA-E remains not claimed.
phases.name: EVIDENCE_AND_STATUS_ASSIGNED

phases.evidence: Single ZIP with PDF/JSON/TSV only, manifest, checksums, runtime profile and receipts.
phases.name: RESULT_CONCRETIZED

phases.evidence: Open external-effect limits preserved; recovery and version lineage included.
phases.name: CLOSURE_CANDIDATE

phases.evidence: Independent validator invocation I2 completed: PASS; receipt assurance/VALIDATION_RECEIPT.json.
phases.name: QUALITY_CONFIRMED

phases.evidence: Release directory and passive-data surfaces materialized; final ZIP identity is recorded externally after packaging to avoid self-hash recursion. Field effects remain future experience.
phases.name: EFFECT_OR_NEW_PHENOMENON
